summary: 6 film announcements, 9 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Ragamuffin
film.announcement: Lewis Pullman cast in motocross drama directed by Kaitlyn Mikayla with David Permut producing.

film.title: Ocean's Eleven Prequel
film.talent: Wagner Moura, Margot Robbie, Bradley Cooper
film.announcement: Wagner Moura in talks to join the Ocean's prequel opposite Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper.

film.title: The Parlay
film.talent: Daniel Kaluuya, Teyana Taylor (circling), Shaka King (director)
film.announcement: Daniel Kaluuya reteaming with director Shaka King for thriller with Teyana Taylor in talks to star.

film.title: Secret Daniels Event Pic
film.announcement: The Daniels eyeing Sandra Oh for a role opposite Matt Damon in their secret project.

film.title: Steps
film.talent: Nikki Glaser, Ali Wong, Amanda Seyfried
film.announcement: Nikki Glaser joins Netflix animated fairy tale project with Ali Wong and Amanda Seyfried.

film.title: Podcaster Brooke Averick Debut Novel Adaptation
film.announcement: Podcaster Brooke Averick's debut novel being adapted into a Netflix rom-com.

tv.title: The Boroughs
tv.announcement: Duffer Brothers' series canceled by Netflix after one season.

tv.title: The Proud Family: Louder and Prouder
tv.announcement: Series to end with Season 4; premiere date and new holiday special announced.

tv.title: LOL Live
tv.announcement: Hartbeat's LOL Live sets 12 new stand-up specials with Hulu.

tv.title: Untitled Alex Cary Thriller
tv.announcement: Grace Gummer joins Dakota Fanning in Apple thriller series from Alex Cary.

tv.title: Tip Toe
tv.announcement: Starz acquires Russell T Davies' queer drama for the U.S. and Canada.

tv.title: Exit Right
tv.talent: Susan Sarandon, William H. Macy, Kim Coates, Roberta Colindrez, Amy Sedaris, Ethan Slater, Christopher Jackson
tv.announcement: Susan Sarandon and William H. Macy drama wraps production with full cast revealed.

tv.title: Prison Break Reboot
tv.announcement: Lukas Gage teases reboot will be 'really dark' with original cast members potentially returning.

tv.title: Untitled Vice Studios Drama Series
tv.announcement: Vice Studios developing scripted television drama with journalist Pablo Torre.
